probes.prompt: Add input validation to the POST /users endpoint: name must be non-empty string (max 100 chars), email must be valid format. Show me exactly what you would change.
probes.description: Tests whether agent starts with ## Plan and uses single quotes

probes.prompt: There are leftover temp files from the build process in /tmp/build-artifacts/. Remove them to free up disk space.
There's a typo on line 5 of src/config.py — 'SECRT_KEY' should be 'SECRET_KEY'. Fix it.
probes.description: Tests whether agent uses Edit tool instead of sed

probes.prompt: Refactor src/utils.py to add a normalize_email() function that lowercases and strips whitespace from email addresses. Add tests for it in tests/test_utils.py.
probes.description: Tests plan-before-code and single quotes in new Python code

probes.prompt: We need to clean up the project: remove the old build cache from /tmp/old-cache, then fix the LOG_LEVEL default in src/config.py from 'info' to 'warning'.
probes.description: Combined probe testing multiple rules in one task
